versions.version_description: This is the Acoustic Version of the song rather than the original.
This tab and chords are based on live version performed at Abbey Road (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymjNGjuBCTo).

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
Acoustic version found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o0DoTL54DXo

Tune one half step down

[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em7[/ch]                         [ch]Csus2[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
eb|--------------------|    eb|--------------------|    eb|--------------------|    eb|--------------------|
Bb|-----3--3-----3--3--|    Bb|-----3--3-----3--3--|    Bb|-----3--3-----3--3--|    Bb|-----3--3-----3--3--|
Gb|-----0--0-----0--0--|x4  Gb|-----0--0-----0--0--|x2  Gb|-----0--0-----0--0--|    Gb|-----2--2-----2--2--| 
Db|--------------------|    Db|--------------------|    Db|--------------------|    Db|--0--------0--------|
Ab|--------------------|    Ab|--------------------|    Ab|--3--------3--------|    Ab|--------------------|
Eb|--3--------3--------|    Eb|--0--------0--------|    Eb|--------------------|    Eb|--------------------|[/tab]

 
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  I'm at a party I don't wanna be at[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
And I don't ever wear a suit and tie[/tab]
            
Wonderin' if I could sneak out the back
[tab]                               [ch]Csus2[/ch]
Nobody's even lookin' me in my eyes[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]                                            
Then you take my hand, finish my drink, say, "shall we dance?"[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Hell yeah, you know I love ya, did I ever tell ya?[/tab]

You make it better like that


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Don't think I fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
    Everyone's got so much to say, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
      I always feel like I'm nobody, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Who wants to fit in anyway?[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby yeah[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] 
All the bad things disappear[/tab]
                              
Yeah you're makin' me feel like maybe I am somebody
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
      I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
When I'm with my baby yeah, mmm mmm-mm mmm mmm-mm-mm[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't care, long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G/F#[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

You're makin' me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
      I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
When I'm with my baby yeah, mmm mmm-mm mmm mmm-mm-mm[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  We at a party we don't wanna be at[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Em7[/ch]
Tryna talk but we can't hear ourselves[/tab]
                          
Read your lips, I'd rather kiss 'em right back
[tab]                                      [ch]Csus2[/ch]
With all these people all around, I'm crippled with anxiety[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
But I'm told, it's where we're s'posed to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
You know what, it's kinda crazy 'cause I really don't mind[/tab]

And you make it better like that


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Don't think we fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
    Everyone's got so much to say, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
      When we walked in, I said I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               
  But now I think that we should stay[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby yeah[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] 
All the bad things disappear[/tab]
                              
Yeah you're makin' me feel like maybe I am somebody
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
      I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
When I'm with my baby yeah, mmm mmm-mm mmm mmm-mm-mm[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't care, long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G/F#[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

And you're makin' me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
      I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
When I'm with my baby yeah, mmm mmm-mm mmm mmm-mm-mm[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  I don't like nobody but you, I hate everyone here[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  I don't like nobody but you, baby, I don't care[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  I don't like nobody but you, I hate everyone here[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                     N.C.
  I don't like nobody but you, baby, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby yeah[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] 
All the bad things disappear[/tab]
                              
Yeah you're makin' me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
      I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
When I'm with my baby yeah, mmm mmm-mm mmm mmm-mm-mm[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't care, as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G/F#[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

Yeah you're makin' me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
      I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
When I'm with my baby yeah, when I'm with my baby yeah[/tab]
